_comment: Medical Oncology package for Hodgkin Lymphoma - ABVD regimen
procedure_name: CT for Hodgkin's Lymphoma (ABVD (doxorubicin-Adriamycin, bleomycin, vinblastin, dacarbazine)) – Only once in life time - first line
min_doctor_qualification: DM (Medical oncology) or equivalent (MD Medicine with experience/Fellowship in Hematology/Medical Oncology)
clinical_indications: First line treatment (Only once in life time)

preauth.label: Clinical notes (Performance status, Stage, Age, comorbidities, CBC, ESR, LFT,RFT, 2D-ECHO, PFT-DLCo)
Biopsy to confirm diagnosis of HL (NLPHL may be given RCHOP if advanced stage and RT alone if stage I disease)
PET-CT (or CECT chest + abdomen and Pelvis+ Bone marrow biopsy- not needed if PET-CT is done)

claim.label: Reports of the tests as written above in mandatory documents
Discharge summary of day care department
Charts of chemotherapy regimen with dates and dose
All the reports as in preauthorization
Response assessment details (both clinical notes and PET-CT)
Reports of 2DECHO and PFT after 4 cycles in patients receiving ABVD

ppd_preauth.q: Patient has PFT and DLCo showing moderate restriction?
Patient is above 75 years and frail?
Interim PET-CT after 2 cycles shows at least Partial response for reapproval of remaining treatment?

cpd_claim.q: Response assessment details (clinical notes and PET-CT) provided?
Reports of 2DECHO and PFT after 4 cycles provided?

common_queries: Clinical notes missing or incomplete (Performance status, Stage, Age, comorbidities, CBC, ESR, LFT,RFT, 2D-ECHO, PFT-DLCo)
Biopsy report confirming diagnosis of HL missing
PET-CT (or CECT chest + abdomen and Pelvis+ Bone marrow biopsy) report missing or incomplete
PFT and DLCo show moderate restriction
Same package re-claimed (ABVD only once in life time)
Patient not in partial or complete response post 2 cycles for reapproval of remaining treatment
Reports of 2DECHO and PFT after 4 cycles missing at claim stage

additional_information.special_empanelment: Essential Medical Personnel: Qualified Medical Oncologist/Hematologist/ Radiation Oncologist; Essential Medical Infrastructure: Chemotherapy unit/ Ward/ Day care/ Injection room/ LINEAC
clinical_key_pointers: Interim PET-CT after 2 cycles should show atleast Partial response and then reapproval for the remaining treatment should be given.
2D-ECHO and PFT with DLCo should be repeated after cycle 4 of ABVD.

Follow-up care (ABVD): Followed by local RT in case of early stage favorable & early stage unfavorable disease. In case of advanced stage with / without local RT. Repeat PET CT after chemotherapy incase interim PET shows partial response (PR). Follow-up 6 monthly for 5 years and later annually. Thyroid function test/ Breast examination (female patient) annually (for those patients who have received radiation to Neck/ breast region, respectively).
contraindications: PFT and DLCo shows moderate restriction
